description: About the Role We are seeking a passionate and detail-oriented DevOps Engineer (System Administrator / DBA) to join our team. This role is responsible for operating and managing Ragnarok Online systems across both domestic and global regions. You will be involved in system maintenance, database administration, BI tool operations, and system setup and migration. Working closely with cross-functional teams, you will help ensure stable and reliable live service operations through automation, cloud infrastructure management, and continuous system optimization. Key Responsibilities · Responsible for the operation and management of the Ragnarok Online system in domestic and overseas regions · Regular inspection and maintenance of systems · Database query and management, operation and management of BI tools (e.g., Metabase) · System setup and migration Qualifications · Experience in server infrastructure operation and service maintenance · In-depth knowledge of Windows OS · Ability to automate tasks using Python, Bash, or PowerShell · Proficiency in MSSQL · Basic understanding of network layers (L2–L7) · No restrictions on overseas business trips (exempted or completed military service, if applicable) · Experience in operating large-scale live services · Experience managing services in cloud environments such as AWS or GCP · Experience in automated deployment using CI/CD tools such as Git or Jenkins · Experience in system operation using scripts such as Batch, Bash, or Python · Experience operating open-source-based services · Strong collaboration and communication skills
